intro: The world's chillest animal just exploded!
description:
Capybaras are famous for their Zen-like patience, but even they have a breaking point! Welcome to Angry Capybara, a hilarious physics simulator in which nature's most relaxed mammal finally resorts to violence. When denied access to your favorite outdoor hot spring, it’s time to take out your frustrations on Granny’s pristine living space. This isn't about sneaking, it's about embracing your inner wrecking ball!

Take control of this bulky, furry menace and embark on a rampage of indoor destruction. Waddle through the hallways, use your size to knock over fragile decorations, and raid the kitchen for all the fresh vegetables you can find. Each shattered plate and stolen snack will fuel your chaos meter, earning you high scores and triggering laugh-out-loud reactions from an increasingly panicked Granny.

As you master the art of the rodent rampage, you'll discover secret passageways, unlock new rooms, and customize your capybara with absurd outfits and colorful skins. Slip into a silly costume, bare those giant incisors, and show Granny that the era of the well-behaved pet is officially over!
